# Issue Template

Thanks for helping improve MergeOS.

Before opening an issue:

- Search existing issues and pull requests.
- Do not include secrets, private keys, customer data, or production credentials.
- Use private vulnerability reporting for suspected security issues.
- For bounty work, star the repository and claim the bounty before opening a PR.

Please use one of the structured issue templates when available:

- Bug report
- Feature request
- Bounty claim

Security reports belong in the private security advisory flow:

https://github.com/mergeos-bounties/mergeos/security/advisories/new
